title: 截图画廊增强
summary: All 5 acceptance criteria are now implemented and tested. AC1 (View Toggle) provides grid/list switching with proper highlighting. AC2 (Date Filtering) correctly queries records by date range with proper timezone handling. AC3 (Quick Preview) opens modal with screenshot and AI analysis. AC4 (Pagination) implements front-end pagination with 20 items per page and load more button. AC5 (Meta Info) displays timestamp and AI summary truncated to 50 characters. Comprehensive test coverage with 24 test cases for the gallery component alone.
strengths: Comprehensive timezone handling in Rust backend with proper Local→UTC conversion using and_local_timezone() pattern
Thorough boundary tests for get_records_by_date_range covering start/end date edges, exclusion cases, and ordering
Excellent test coverage: 24 tests for ScreenshotGallery covering AC1, AC3, AC4, AC5 plus 7 tests for date filtering
Proper Tauri command registration in main.rs for get_records_by_date_range
Front-end pagination correctly implemented with computed properties (paginatedScreenshots, hasMorePages)
Pagination resets to page 1 when filter is applied - proper state management
AI summary correctly truncated to 50 characters per spec
Reusable loadThumbnails() helper function extracted from loadScreenshots()
Active view button highlighting with bg-primary class improves UX
